race.comment: LIVE ON LOVE (1) delivered as expected here on debut and impressed. Resumes today after 315 days and has been fitted with three trials. Won the latest at Longford and Byrne Burkes' booking suggests she's pleasing.The one to beat if presented on song. ROYAL DETECTIVE (6) resumes and has switched from a NSW yard. Ran a good number at Moruya last time and she goes well fresh. Has a low barrier and 1.5kg claim and the betting will be key. ARGYLL DIAMOND (3) didn't feature here last time but the form leading into that stacks right up. Has been kept on the fresh side and also has claims. OUTBUSH (2) led and won his Maiden here and then was plainer at Launceston as the betting indicated. Peaks now and keeps the 3kg claim and the shorter sprint suits better. He can get back on track. LADY FERN (9) drops back 300m on a 9-day return and may show more like her best. The 2kg claim helps, and look for her late.
